summary: Comprehensive testing of VenuLoQ auth page restructure, Google OAuth infrastructure, BottomTabBar notification badge, and MyEnquiriesPage enhancements. All 10 backend tests passed (100%). All 14 frontend UI tests passed (100%).

auth_page_email_primary.detail: Email input and 'Continue with Email' gold button displayed as primary CTA

auth_page_google_secondary.detail: Google button visible below 'or' divider (secondary position)

auth_page_password_tertiary.detail: 'Sign in with password instead' link present below Google button

password_form_display.detail: Clicking password link shows email+password form with 'Sign In' submit button

google_auth_url_503.detail: POST /api/auth/google/auth-url returns 503 when no credentials set

my_enquiries_last_activity.detail: GET /api/my-enquiries returns leads with last_activity object (message + at fields)

bottom_tab_bar_visible.detail: BottomTabBar visible on mobile with 5 tabs: Home, Explore, Saved, Requests, Profile

bottom_tab_bar_badge.detail: Notification badge showing '3' on Requests tab

bottom_tab_bar_navigation.detail: All tabs navigate correctly: Home→/, Explore→/venues/search, Saved→/favorites, Requests→/my-enquiries, Profile→/profile

my_enquiries_page_content.detail: 12 enquiry cards with stage badges ('NEW CLIENT CASE'), last activity timestamps ('Enquiry submitted 1w ago'), and Live Progress timeline

team_login_navigation.detail: Team Login link navigates to /login (Team Portal page)

critical_code_review_comments: AuthPage.js correctly implements OTP-primary, Google-secondary, Password-tertiary hierarchy
GoogleAuthCallback.js properly handles OAuth callback with code exchange
BottomTabBar.js polls /api/notifications every 30s for unread badge count
MyEnquiriesPage.js displays last_activity timestamps from enriched API response
google_auth.py returns enabled:false when GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID not set (correct behavior)
leads.py enriches my-enquiries with last_activity from notifications collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth page restructure fully tested. Email OTP is primary CTA, Google is secondary (below 'or' divider), Password is tertiary (link below Google). Google OAuth infrastructure is in place but disabled (returns enabled:false) until user injects GCP credentials. BottomTabBar shows notification badge on Requests tab (polls /api/notifications every 30s). MyEnquiriesPage shows enquiry cards with last_activity timestamps and stage badges. All features working correctly.
